text: Moving through these modern, geometric spaces, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass and clean lines evoke transparency and openness, while the visible evacuation equipment reminds me of human vulnerability amid our technological advancements. Entering the exhibition space adorned with "R+D" and thoughtful text, I am enveloped in a spirit of inquiry—how do we, as humans, relate to continuous progress and innovation? I sense I am part of something unfolding, yet also remain an observer, pondering my place within these structured realms of knowledge and creativity.
